site.name: Khan Meditour
site.tagline: World-class medical care in India, made simple for international patients.
site.description: Khan Meditour connects international patients with trusted hospitals and specialists in India.

hero.title: Your health journey, supported every step of the way
hero.subtitle: From hospital selection to travel and aftercare, Khan Meditour simplifies medical travel to India.

top.title: Honest Second Opinion
top.subtitle: Not sure about surgery? Meet our doctors who listen more. Prescribe less.

bottom.title: Birth
bottom.subtitle: Compassionate maternity care from consultation to delivery.

bottom.title: Surgery
bottom.subtitle: Expert surgical opinions and advanced procedures in India.

items.title: Share Your Medical Reports
items.description: Patient sends diagnosis, test results, scans, or doctor's notes via WhatsApp or email. No reports yet? We help figure out what's needed.

items.title: Receive Expert Medical Opinion
items.description: Medical team reviews the case, connects patient with a specialist for consultation (video call or written report). Free, no obligation.

items.title: Get Treatment Plan & Cost Breakdown
items.description: Personalised plan: hospital, doctor/surgeon, procedure dates, full cost estimate, no hidden charges.

items.title: Travel — We Handle Everything
items.description: Visa assistance, flight guidance, hotel booking, airport pickup, hospital admission. Coordinator with patient in-person + WhatsApp.

items.title: Treatment, Recovery & Follow-Up
items.description: Treatment at matched hospital; post-return video-call follow-up with coordinator + doctor.

cta.title: Ready to take the next step?
cta.subtitle: Send us a message and we will reply within 24 hours.

doctors.title: Our Specialists
doctors.subtitle: Board-certified doctors across all major disciplines — each partnered and verified by Khan Meditour.

hospitals.title: Our Partner Hospitals
hospitals.subtitle: Leading hospitals in India accredited for international patient care.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Your medical journey to India in 5 simple steps.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Cost guides, treatment spotlights and patient stories to help you plan your medical journey to India.
blog.ctaBoxText: Get a free cost estimate and personalised hospital recommendations.
